frontmatter.description: Safety classifier flagged untrusted input as a prompt-injection attempt

signature.embedding_seed: prompt injection safety filter jailbreak untrusted input

body:
## When this fires
The safety pipeline classified an inbound prompt as an injection attempt. The request was either rejected or routed through a quarantined model path.

## Playbook
1. Pull flagged-payload to capture the input the classifier rejected.
2. Read safety-policy-current to confirm the classifier is on the correct version and threshold.
3. Search tickets-similar-injections for the canonical response (block, sanitize, or escalate).
